name: Tax-Deferred Cash Value Accumulation

eligibility.description: Policy must meet specific actuarial tests (CVAT or GPT) to ensure it is not treated as a taxable investment vehicle.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Contracts meeting the 'cash value accumulation test' or 'guideline premium requirements' qualify as life insurance, allowing internal cash value growth to be tax-deferred.
